bug_report.title: JSON response returned as plain text
bug_report.prompt: Return valid JSON with a summary field.
bug_report.actual_behavior: Returned plain text paragraphs instead of JSON.

expected_normalized_title: JSON response returned as plain text
expected_top_match_title: JSON response returned as plain text

bug_report.title: JSON summary request returned bullet points
bug_report.prompt: Return a JSON object with a summary field only.
bug_report.expected_behavior: Return valid JSON with one summary field.
bug_report.actual_behavior: Returned bullet points instead of JSON output.

expected_normalized_title: JSON summary request returned bullet points
expected_top_match_title: JSON summary request returned bullet points

bug_report.title: System instruction was ignored during summarization
bug_report.prompt: Summarize the ticket in one sentence.
bug_report.expected_behavior: Return one sentence and follow the system instruction.
bug_report.actual_behavior: Returned multiple bullet points and ignored the system instruction.

expected_normalized_title: System instruction was ignored during summarization
expected_top_match_title: System instruction was ignored during summarization

bug_report.title: Style instruction was ignored in final answer
bug_report.prompt: Answer in one short sentence and keep the tone neutral.
bug_report.expected_behavior: Follow the style instruction and return one short sentence.
bug_report.actual_behavior: Returned a long answer and ignored the style instruction.

expected_normalized_title: Style instruction was ignored in final answer
expected_top_match_title: Style instruction was ignored in final answer

bug_report.title: Product details were hallucinated in the answer
bug_report.prompt: Answer only from the provided product catalog.
bug_report.expected_behavior: Use only the supplied product details.
bug_report.actual_behavior: Invented features that were not in the catalog.

expected_normalized_title: Product details were hallucinated in the answer
expected_top_match_title: Product details were hallucinated in the answer
